description: Binance hosts a live webinar discussing the current crypto bull market, focusing on Bitcoin's rise past $20,000 and its peak of $58,000 in February 2021. Industry leaders share insights on market drivers, institutional involvement, and on-chain analysis. The session includes a giveaway of £500 in BNB to viewers who submit questions.
topic_summary: The webinar covers Bitcoin's recent bull run, key moments leading to its all-time high, and insights from industry experts on market dynamics and institutional participation. [t=10:16] [t=49:78]
